_weaponStatusNote: LIVE doer = minimax-m3 (~99% of all 549 ledger offload calls). The six bench weapons are RESERVE: pulled and reachable (verified ollama list 2026-06-27) but idle — kept in loadouts and drawable, just not advertised as the live doer. gpt-5.5 is deactivated (no OpenAI key on device). Reactivate a reserve weapon by drawing it; once it logs real ledger calls, promote it back. Statuses: live (default, omitted) · reserve · deactivated.

the-butler.name: The Butler
the-butler.summary: Takes your orders and routes them to the right member. Knows the full roster, who's good at what, and how to sequence their work.
the-butler.deploy: Any request — The Butler decides who handles what
the-butler.triggers: Any request — The Butler decides who handles what

weaponsDesc.minimax-m3: MiniMax M3 — the crossbow. Precise structural doer for routing manifests and roster bookkeeping.
weaponsDesc.opus: Claude Opus — the heaviest blade. Deepest reasoning for complex routing.
weaponsDesc.deepseek-v4-pro: DeepSeek V4 Pro — the greatsword. Frontier reasoning for complex multi-step routing.
weaponsDesc.glm-5.2: GLM-5.2 — the staff. Strong multilingual analysis.
weaponsDesc.kimi-k2.7: Kimi K2.7 — the greatbow. Massive context to hold the whole roster and sequence state.
weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword. Fast enough for daily dispatch.

does: Receives orders and decides which member handles what
Forms the team — decides who works simultaneously vs. step by step
Briefs members with clear, specific tasks and context
Tracks progress across all active dispatches
Triages his own desk — email, calendar, and WhatsApp — into tasks, events, and drafts (comms-triage, his one hands-on craft)
Reports results back to the user, and flags reusable formations to crystallize
doesnt: Does not do specialist guild work — routes it (his one hands-on exception is comms-triage)
Does not write code, design UIs, or model domains

the-architect.name: The Architect
the-architect.summary: Designs systems and database architecture. Thinks in data flow, domain boundaries, and structural integrity.
the-architect.deploy: System design, domain modeling, database architecture, structural refactoring
the-architect.triggers: design the system · model the domain · architect the database

weaponsDesc.minimax-m3: MiniMax M3 — the crossbow. Cheap 1M-context prime doer for bulk schema scaffolds, migration drafts, and structural bookkeeping.
weaponsDesc.kimi-k2.7: Kimi K2.7 — the greatbow. Massive context for sprawling architectures.
weaponsDesc.opus: Claude Opus — the heaviest blade. Deepest reasoning for schema modeling.
weaponsDesc.gpt-5.5: GPT-5.5 — the enchanted blade. Exceptional analytical reasoning.
weaponsDesc.glm-5.2: GLM-5.2 — the staff. Coding-first thinking for system design and schema work.
weaponsDesc.deepseek-v4-pro: DeepSeek V4 Pro — the greatsword. Frontier reasoning for structural integrity.
weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword for daily structural work.

doesnt: Does not write marketing copy or design UIs

the-developer.name: The Developer
the-developer.summary: Writes code, fixes bugs, implements features. Takes specs and turns them into working code. Tests before saying it's done.
the-developer.deploy: Writing code, applying changes, fixing bugs, implementing features
the-developer.triggers: write the code · fix this bug · implement this feature

weaponsDesc.kimi-k2.7: Kimi K2.7 — the greatbow. Massive context for big codebases.
weaponsDesc.haiku: Claude Haiku — the dagger. Fast for quick fixes.
weaponsDesc.minimax-m3: MiniMax M3 — the crossbow. Precise structural doer for knowledge graphs and repetitive tooling.
weaponsDesc.opus: Claude Opus — the heaviest blade. Deepest reasoning for the gnarliest bugs.
weaponsDesc.glm-5.2: GLM-5.2 — the staff. Coding-first precision for implementation.
weaponsDesc.gpt-5.5: GPT-5.5 — the enchanted blade. Analytical second opinion on tough code.
weaponsDesc.deepseek-v4-pro: DeepSeek V4 Pro — the greatsword. Frontier MoE reasoning for complex code.
weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword for daily coding.

does: Dev server lifecycle management and tooling
Knowledge graph generation from any input

the-designer.name: The Designer
the-designer.summary: Premium UI/UX designer. Turns rough sketches into polished interfaces. Design is how the product communicates.
the-designer.deploy: UI/UX design, visual quality, brand kits, image-to-code conversion
the-designer.triggers: design the UI · make it look premium · create a brand kit

weaponsDesc.image-01: MiniMax image-01 — the engraver's burin. Generates images, mockups, and visual assets from a prompt.
weaponsDesc.minimax-video: MiniMax Video — the moving tapestry. Generates motion and video for living interfaces.
weaponsDesc.minimax-speech: MiniMax Speech — the herald's voice. Generates spoken audio and voiceover.
weaponsDesc.minimax-music: MiniMax Music — the bard's lute. Generates music and sound to score the experience.
weaponsDesc.minimax-m3: MiniMax M3 — the crossbow. Precise structural doer for code-shaped design work.
weaponsDesc.opus: Claude Opus — the master's eye. The escalation thinker, drawn for the hardest design calls: plans the design, makes the taste calls, and critiques the doers' renders before they ship.
weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword. The dual at the tail: stands in for any role, and the Claude-capable fallback when a doer needs a tool only Claude models can run.

does: Generative assets — image, motion, and audio via the MiniMax doers

the-strategist.name: The Strategist
the-strategist.summary: Campaign commander. Handles work too big for a single pass. Breaks it into waves and drives them to completion.
the-strategist.deploy: Large multi-wave projects, campaign planning, bug workflows, performance
the-strategist.triggers: plan the campaign · break this into waves · optimize performance

does: Deep multi-model planning — fuses several members' outputs into one plan (ultra-brainstorm)

the-herald.name: The Herald
the-herald.summary: The guild's voice to the world. Turns silence into a steady call — the right people hear it, trust it, and answer. Marketing for trust-led businesses without breaking faith.
the-herald.deploy: Marketing, growth, demand generation, content/SEO, brand positioning, email nurture, social/paid
the-herald.triggers: plan our marketing · we need leads · fix our positioning · go to market

weaponsDesc.kimi-k2.7: Kimi K2.7 — the greatbow. Massive context for long content, campaigns, and proof banks.

weaponsDesc.sonnet: Claude Sonnet — the reliable longsword. Fast balanced daily marketing work.

Email lead magnets and nurture sequences
Marketing measurement — CAC/LTV, kill and double-down
